article.body_preview:
Bangladesh Jeweller's Association (BAJUS) has called upon Finance Minister AHM Mustafa Kamal to review the retail tax on gold ornaments and the import duty on capital machinery to support the gold industry.

BAJUS President Sayem Sobhan Anvir recently wrote to the finance minister seeking policy support for the jewellery industry ahead of the national budget.

llm_connections.evidence_quote: “the customs duty on importing gold is reduced from five percent to one percent.”
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article discusses import duties on gold at the industry level, which directly relates to the volume of goods brought into the country through imports.

verification.quote_best_match: the customs duty on importing gold is reduced from five percent to one percent.
verification.judge_reasoning: The article explicitly says the gold industry has the potential to attract more investment if the customs duty on importing gold is reduced from five percent to one percent. This directly supports the claimed causal relationship at the industry/national policy level.
